cookies.body: This website does not use any analytics tools or tracking of any kind. Only functional cookies are used. These are small text files stored by your web browser on your device. They help retain certain settings—such as language or display preferences—and recognize you when you return. This ensures that logged-in sessions remain active, so you don’t have to log in every time you visit. Cookies remain on your device for up to one year unless you delete them manually. Most modern web browsers allow you to monitor, limit, or block the use of cookies. Many can also be configured to automatically delete cookies when the browser is closed. Please note that disabling cookies may limit the functionality of this website.
cookies.title: Analytics/Cookies/External Resources etc.?

data.body: When simply visiting this website, only the cookies listed below are collected. These cookies are not stored on the server but are saved exclusively on your local device. The website contains buttons labeled “By clicking, you confirm the privacy policy.” By clicking these buttons, the data you enter on the website is transmitted to the server and stored there. Further information about this process can be found in the next section. Access to this data is granted exclusively to the operator of the website, as named in the legal notice. The data is used solely to process your request and will not be shared with third parties without your explicit consent. Consent for making your personal data publicly visible can be granted after registration via the “Public in guest list” button. In this case, all information you have provided will be publicly accessible. Collecting this data is generally necessary to plan the event appropriately. All stored data will be permanently deleted no later than one week after the end of the event.
data.title: What data is collected by this website?

registration.body: When you submit a form, the entered data is transmitted in encrypted form to a server located in Frankfurt am Main (Germany) and securely stored in a database. Primarily, only the data visibly entered into the form is stored. In addition, only two further pieces of information are collected: an anonymous user ID and the timestamp of the registration. The website also offers the option to sign in via external providers (e.g., Google). If you register using such a button, the website gains access to your email address stored with the provider as well as publicly available profile data. Only your email address is stored and used for registration or login purposes. Upon personal request to the operator’s email address listed in the legal notice (imprint), all stored personal data can be provided.
registration.title: How the data provided is processed and stored?

rights.body: According to DSGVO and BDSG, you can request information, updating, blocking or deletion of all your data at any time. Your contact person for this is the above-mentioned operator of this website. In addition, I am obliged to remind you of your right to object to this consent at any time and, if necessary, to complain to a supervisory authority about me.
rights.title: What are my rights?
